note: Project docs/ is the GitHub Pages web root (PWA), not documentation. Dev docs live in documentation/.

docs.title: Architecture
docs.summary: System overview, data flow, modules, key design decisions (incl. the three monitors), briefing.json schema, CLI entry points.

docs.title: Integrations
docs.summary: External services (Yahoo Finance, Gemini, ntfy, RSS, GitHub Pages/Actions, v2 Twelve Data), usage, invocation sites, env var names.

docs.title: Operations
docs.summary: Scheduling and DST, one-time deployment (secret/var name mapping), runtime, monitoring (3 alarms), failure modes and recovery, regression tests, cost.
